headline: Did Governance Pushback and New AI Partnerships Just Reframe Autodesk's (ADSK) Investment Narrative?
summary: In April 2026, Autodesk faced shareholder activism as John Chevedden proposed giving holders of 10% of outstanding common stock, or the lowest percentage allowed under state law, the power to call online special shareholder meetings, while the company filed a preliminary proxy urging investors to vote against the measure at its June 17, 2026 annual meeting. Alongside this governance debate, Autodesk’s growth story was reinforced by fresh AI-focused leadership and large-scale enterprise and...
